Shri Alok Rawat shall hold office for a period of three years from the date of assumption of charge of office or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [No. 9-2/2014-NCW (A) (Pt.)] SAMIR SINHA, Under Secy. 4483 GI/2015 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
